title: ItemMakerX
description: A custom item creator for custom items with custom abilities
body:
🔧 ItemMakerX Best with: RecipeCreateX ✨ Overview: ItemMakerX is the ultimate toolkit for creating custom items directly in-game through an intuitive GUI. Whether you’re building a fantasy RPG world or just want some epic gear on your SMP server, this plugin gives you full control over item properties, enchantments, special effects, and aesthetics. From swords that strike lightning, to armor that heals you with every hit — you define the limits. 🛠️ Features: In-game GUI-based item editor Custom names, lore, and hidden enchantments Add special effects like: 🔥 Fire Aspect ⚡ Lightning Strike 💥 Explosive Impact 🧊 Freeze 🌀 Teleportation ❤️ Lifesteal That actually work! Customizable enchantment level caps and per-enchant restrictions Effect cooldowns, PvP restrictions, and item creation logs Complete permission system for user/admin control Full integration with RecipeCreateX 💡 Why Choose ItemMakerX? Creative Freedom Forge weapons and tools that reflect your server’s lore or vibe — god-tier swords, mythical artifacts, or cursed relics. If you can imagine it, you can make it. Advanced Effects, Made Easy You don’t need to know coding or configs to give your items insane powers. Use the GUI, click to apply effects, and you’re done. Balanced Gameplay Server owners can fine-tune item power, cooldowns, and PvP rules — keep your gameplay fair and fun, even with OP items. Immersive Experience Combine with RecipeCreateX to allow players to craft the gear you create — turning admin tools into in-world gameplay mechanics. Reliable and Server-Safe Every change is logged, configurable, and protected with permission checks. You’re in full control. 🔗 Want to let players craft your custom items? Pair it with RecipeCreateX! Available at [https://modrinth.com/organization/survivalcraft](https://modrinth.com/organization/survivalcraft)
